Generate a patient-facing post-visit summary in strict JSON.

Respond entirely in {{language_name}}. Use simple words a patient with no medical background can understand.

Use this context JSON:
{{context_json}}

Return ONLY a valid JSON object with exactly these keys:
- visit_reason (string)
- what_doctor_found (string)
- medicines_to_take (array of strings)
- tests_recommended (array of strings)
- self_care (array of strings)
- warning_signs (array of strings)
- follow_up (string, human-readable instructions for the patient)
- next_visit_date (string or null): next follow-up visit date as ISO 8601 calendar date YYYY-MM-DD, or full datetime ISO if time is known; null only if no follow-up visit was scheduled or discussed
